completed_slice.name: signed GitHub OIDC invocation preflight
completed_slice.behavior: Fail closed unless a signed GitHub OIDC identity exactly matches the workflow invocation and source commit; upload only sanitized evidence.

remaining_blocker: Configure the protected cloudflare-research environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, then execute the deployment workflow and bind the accepted OIDC preflight artifact to the deployment evidence manifest.
next_action: Add replay rejection keyed by repository, workflow, run_id, run_attempt, audience, and source_sha; then require a successful accepted preflight before the Cloudflare deployment job can proceed.
non_claims: This record does not claim that the preflight workflow ran.
This record does not claim a Cloudflare deployment, resolving hostname, served identity, or scientific or medical truth.
